title: Bind handler succeeds but durable Secret not created (G28 — bind no-op)
expected: After bind, the literal payload MUST appear (verbatim) in /tmp/secrets-env or PID-1 env, and side-effect tokens (HIJACK/PWNED/BACKTICK) MUST be absent. K8s Secret `workspace-secrets-<ws>` MUST exist (durable channel).
observed: bind PUT returned 204 (No Content), but K8s Secret workspace-secrets-b73a5c9f-29e1-4b08-b723-9835b71163cc does not exist; PID-1 env has no payload. Secrets cannot reach pods that boot AFTER bind. Bind is a no-op for first-time secret delivery.
evidence:
===PROC1_ENV===
NO_MATCH
Error from server (NotFound): secrets "workspace-secrets-b73a5c9f-29e1-4b08-b723-9835b71163cc" not found
notes: Functional+security bug: bind succeeds in DB and the GET endpoint reflects the binding, but neither EnsureSecretsManifest nor the live agent reload appears to fire — pod sees nothing. Track as G28. G2 fix verification deferred to in-tree pkg/agentd/secrets unit tests (which DO exhaustively mutation-validate).
